prompt: Create a highly detailed realistic miniature diorama photograph of a anime schoolgirl figurine standing on a polished octagonal wooden display base inside an elegant old library. The figure is full body, centered, posed shyly with knees slightly crossed and both arms hugging a dark green hardcover book to her chest. She wears a navy blue blazer with white piping, gold buttons, a small crest patch, a white shirt, red necktie, red tartan pleated skirt caught in a slight motion flare, white knee-high socks, and black penny loafers. She has very long flowing glossy black hair with a white headband, many loose strands curling outward dramatically as if lifted by a gentle breeze; her face is covered by a square soft blur censor block. The environment is a warm, richly detailed wood-paneled library with tall bookshelves packed with old leather-bound books, carved columns, an arched window glowing with golden afternoon light, wooden desks and chairs with green leather seats, two brass banker lamps with green glass shades, small stacked books, and a tiny potted plant. Use shallow depth of field, cinematic warm lighting, realistic wood grain, glossy reflections on the floor and display base, collectible figure proportions with smooth painted skin, extremely sharp craftsmanship, macro photography, vertical composition, premium diorama realism, no text.
